title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
friendlyTitle: OmniRoute: one local gateway for many AI providers
summary: OmniRoute is a local-first AI gateway and OpenAI-compatible proxy for routing coding tools and agents across many providers, with fallback, provider pooling, compression, MCP/A2A support, and desktop/PWA options.
friendlySummary: OmniRoute lets developers connect coding tools to many AI providers through one local endpoint. It also includes fallback and cost-saving features.
whyItMatters: Developers can use it as a single local endpoint for tools such as Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, and other OpenAI-compatible clients, especially when they want provider fallback and cost controls.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it when you want one place to manage many model providers instead of changing settings in every AI coding tool.
